data.body: CORRECTION: llm.repo_path is NOT a config-file key (the earlier inventory listed it both ways). REBAR_LLM_REPO_PATH is a RUNTIME, invocation-specific override (which repo the agent reads) -> env-only, not a persistent [tool.rebar] setting. Authoritative per the approved Cluster B decision. Documented in docs/config.md (Runtime-only section).
